product_overview: HOTELPMS is a hotel property management system for guests, staff, and administrators to manage room browsing, bookings, hotel operations, and housekeeping workflows. It combines a public booking website with role-based operational panels for front office, admin, and housekeeping teams.
core_goals: Browse hotel rooms, view room details, and book stays online
Register, sign in, and manage guest profile and bookings
Allow administrators to manage rooms, staff, bookings, and hotel content
Enable front office staff to handle check-in, check-out, guest folios, services, and payments
Help housekeeping staff track room status, cleaning tasks, and assignments

features.name: Public room browsing and booking
features.description: Guests can explore the hotel website, filter available rooms, view room details, and start an online booking journey.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View homepage content -> Browse room types -> Filter rooms by type and price -> Open a room detail page -> Review amenities and pricing -> Start a booking journey
Navigate to / -> Browse room types -> Apply a filter that returns no matches -> See an empty results state
Navigate to / -> Open a room detail page -> Review room information -> Start a booking journey -> Proceed with online reservation steps

features.name: Guest authentication and account access
features.description: Guests can create an account, sign in, recover access, and use their authenticated profile area.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open guest sign-up or login flow -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> Complete OTP verification -> See authenticated access
Navigate to / -> Open guest login flow -> Enter valid email and password -> Submit the form -> See signed-in account access
Navigate to / -> Open forgot password flow -> Enter email address -> Submit the reset request -> Complete password reset flow -> Sign in with the new password
Navigate to / -> Open login flow -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the form -> See validation or access denied feedback

features.name: Guest profile and bookings
features.description: Signed-in guests can review their profile details and view their booking history and reservation status.
user_flows: Navigate to guest account area -> View profile information -> Review existing bookings
Navigate to guest account area -> Open bookings section -> Select a booking from the list -> Review booking details and status

features.name: Gallery, facilities, contact, and about pages
features.description: Visitors can learn about the hotel through informational pages that highlight facilities, gallery content, and contact information.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open gallery page -> View hotel images and venue content
Navigate to / -> Open facilities page -> Review hotel amenities and offerings
Navigate to / -> Open about page -> Read hotel background and information
Navigate to / -> Open contact page -> View contact and inquiry information

features.name: Admin staff login and dashboard
features.description: Admins and authorized staff can sign in to the admin area and view operational metrics on the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Enter staff credentials -> Submit the form -> See the admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin/login -> Enter incorrect staff credentials -> Submit the form -> See validation or access denied feedback
Navigate to /admin -> View dashboard metrics and summary information

features.name: Admin management of rooms, bookings, guests, staff, services, and gallery
features.description: Administrators can manage hotel inventory and operational records from the admin panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open room types management -> Create a room type -> Save changes -> See the new room type in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Open room inventory management -> Update a room record -> Save changes -> See the updated room information
Navigate to /admin -> Open bookings management -> Review booking records -> Update a booking status -> See the updated booking in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Open guest management -> Review guest records -> Update guest information -> See the saved guest profile
Navigate to /admin -> Open staff management -> Create or edit a staff user -> Save changes -> See the updated staff list
Navigate to /admin -> Open extra services management -> Create or edit a service -> Save changes -> See the updated service list
Navigate to /admin -> Open gallery management -> Add or update a venue or image entry -> Save changes -> See the updated gallery content
Navigate to /admin -> Open settings -> Update hotel configuration -> Save changes -> See the updated settings

features.name: Front office daily operations
features.description: Front office staff can manage guest arrivals, departures, folios, services, payments, and operational reporting.
user_flows: Navigate to /frontoffice -> View dashboard summary -> Open check-in workflow -> Complete guest arrival steps -> See the room marked as occupied
Navigate to /frontoffice -> Open check-out workflow -> Review guest stay details -> Complete departure steps -> See the room marked as available
Navigate to /frontoffice -> Open guest folio -> Review charges and balance -> Record a payment -> See the folio updated with the new balance
Navigate to /frontoffice -> Open service POS -> Add an extra service to a guest folio -> Save the service entry -> See the charge reflected in the account
Navigate to /frontoffice -> Open reports -> Review operational reports and payment summaries
Navigate to /frontoffice -> View notifications -> Observe real-time operational updates

features.name: Housekeeping room status and task management
features.description: Housekeeping staff can monitor room status, manage cleaning tasks, assign work, and review room-specific housekeeping details.
user_flows: Navigate to /housekeeping -> View room status grid -> Identify rooms by visual status indicators
Navigate to /housekeeping -> Open cleaning tasks -> Review assigned tasks -> Mark a task as completed -> See the task removed or updated in the list
Navigate to /housekeeping -> Open staff assignment -> Assign a room or task to a staff member -> Save the assignment -> See the updated assignment
Navigate to /housekeeping -> Open a room detail view -> Review housekeeping notes and room-specific information

code_summary.description: Hotel Property Management System - full-stack web application for hotel operations, guest bookings, and staff management.

features: Homepage with hero, room types, testimonials
Room types and room inventory CRUD

methods: Email and password with OTP verification
